docsGovernanceBoundary.summary: LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md no longer tracks exact private Ghidra project/store/backup pointers; it keeps public overlay guidance and private-path boundaries.
limits: Does not erase earlier git history.
Does not publish private path manifests.
Does not authorize Ghidra, installed-game, or original-executable mutation.

No command arming, shell dispatch, importer execution, private asset read, generated payload output, runtime proof, visual/gameplay proof, rebuild parity, runtime parity, or no-noticeable-difference parity.

lorePackBoundary.summary: Lore pack loading fails closed for unsafe loaded document paths, duplicate ids/paths, hash mismatch, incomplete pack signals, empty packs, and malformed content-pack document ids while keeping user-facing load failures generic.
limits: Not broad ZIP package probe parity.
Not a complete filesystem traversal vulnerability fix.
lorePackBoundary.nextHardening: Add ZIP package probe relativePath parity and decide whether AppCore should enforce index/content relativePath equality in addition to builder/check tooling.

futureExtractionGates: Host/Join partial, punctuation, and case-variant boundary tests.
